title: Clone Coverage Ledger
description: Feature inventory + coverage state for engineer-cloner reverse observation. Written during Phase 2 (authenticated traversal), resumable across sessions, the single source of truth for full-feature coverage.

url.description: 目标站点地址 / target site URL

authorized.description: 授权确认标记 / authorization confirmed

inferred_stack.description: 从指纹推断的原栈 / stack inferred from fingerprint

roles.description: 已遍历的角色 / roles traversed

do_not_clone.description: 不克隆边界：支付/第三方/密钥 / out-of-scope surfaces

dry_rounds.description: 连续无新发现的轮数 / consecutive rounds with no new features

pass_count.description: 已完成的遍历轮数 / traversal passes completed

complete.description: loop-until-dry 是否收敛 / whether discovery converged

features.description: 功能账本条目 / feature ledger entries

entry_path.description: URL 或点击序列（SPA）/ URL or click-sequence for SPAs

roles_visible.description: 可见此功能的角色 / roles that can see this feature

ui_states.description: 观测到的 UI 状态：默认/空态/错误态/加载 / observed UI states

forms.description: 表单字段与校验 / form fields and validations

api_calls.description: 观测到的 API 调用引用 / references to observed API calls

screenshots.description: .agents/clone.observations/ 下的截图路径 / screenshot paths

coverage_status.description: discovered=已发现未展开, explored=已遍历状态, extracted=契约与设计已提取
